title.en: FerryBox tile plot (Hovmöller-style) for one or more parameters

description.en: Reads a FerryBox CSV and generates one or more Hovmöller-style tile plots over time and latitude for selected parameters. Optional filters: date interval, latitude bounds, storm date marker. Outputs a PNG.

input_csv.title: input_csv
input_csv.description: Path (inside container mount) or URL to FerryBox CSV containing datetime, latitude, longitude, parameter and value.

start_date.title: start_date
start_date.description: Optional start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use null or omit for no filter.

end_date.title: end_date
end_date.description: Optional end date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use null or omit for no filter.

parameters.title: parameters
parameters.description: Optional list of parameters to plot. If omitted or empty, all available parameters are used.

storm_date.title: storm_date
storm_date.description: Optional storm date (YYYY-MM-DD) to mark with a dashed vertical line.
